infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Leap needs camera access to record your daily challenge.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Leap needs microphone access to record audio with your video.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Leap needs photo library access so you can attach a video to your challenge.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Leap uses notifications to remind you when today’s challenge is live and before time runs out.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Leap uses Face ID to protect your saved sign-in.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Leap uses Face ID to protect your saved sign-in.
